summary: Machine Cleaning Tracker app - fix all problems requested

existing_features.title: Replace all instances of the text 'Machine Part' with 'Machine Cleaning' throughout the entire application — including UI labels, titles, headings, button text, placeholder text, select option labels, alert banners, modal titles, stats bar labels, and any other user-facing text in all frontend components and pages.

new_feature_requests.summary: Audit and fix all broken or non-functional backend Motoko logic in backend/main.mo, including any compile errors, incorrect access control logic, broken CRUD operations for machines, and any issues with user profile management or admin/user role handling.

Audit and fix all frontend issues across all pages and components, including broken React Query hooks in useQueries.ts, incorrect data fetching or mutation logic, broken modal dialogs (AddMachineModal, EditMachineModal, DeleteConfirmDialog, RescheduleDateModal), malfunctioning alert banners (DueTodayAlertBanner, OverdueAlertBanner), and any rendering errors or broken UI interactions in Dashboard.tsx and AddContactDetailsPage.tsx.

Fix all issues in the app's authentication and onboarding flow: ensure Internet Identity login correctly triggers the AddContactDetailsPage for new users and the Dashboard for returning users, and that logout properly resets the per-principal localStorage state.

Fix all issues with date utilities in frontend/src/utils/dateUtils.ts, including correct conversion between IC nanosecond timestamps and JavaScript Dates, accurate machine cleaning status computation (ok, due-soon, due-today, overdue), and correct next-due-date calculation logic.

Audit and fix all broken or non-functional backend Motoko logic in backend/main.mo, including any compile errors, incorrect access control logic, broken CRUD operations for machines, and any issues with user profile management or admin/user role handling.

Audit and fix all frontend issues across all pages and components, including broken React Query hooks in useQueries.ts, incorrect data fetching or mutation logic, broken modal dialogs (AddMachineModal, EditMachineModal, DeleteConfirmDialog, RescheduleDateModal), malfunctioning alert banners (DueTodayAlertBanner, OverdueAlertBanner), and any rendering errors or broken UI interactions in Dashboard.tsx and AddContactDetailsPage.tsx.

Fix all issues in the app's authentication and onboarding flow: ensure Internet Identity login correctly triggers AddContactDetailsPage for new users and the Dashboard for returning users, and that logout properly resets per-principal localStorage state.

Fix all issues with date utilities in frontend/src/utils/dateUtils.ts, including correct conversion between IC nanosecond timestamps and JavaScript Dates, accurate machine cleaning status computation (ok, due-soon, due-today, overdue), and correct next-due-date calculation logic.
Replace all instances of 'Machine Part' with 'Machine Cleaning' throughout the app (UI labels, titles, headings, and any relevant text).

Audit and fix all broken or non-functional backend Motoko logic in backend/main.mo, including any compile errors, incorrect access control logic, broken CRUD operations for machines, and any issues with user profile management or admin/user role handling.

Audit and fix all frontend issues across all pages and components, including broken React Query hooks in useQueries.ts, incorrect data fetching or mutation logic, broken modal dialogs (AddMachineModal, EditMachineModal, DeleteConfirmDialog, RescheduleDateModal), malfunctioning alert banners (DueTodayAlertBanner, OverdueAlertBanner), and any rendering errors or broken UI interactions in Dashboard.tsx and AddContactDetailsPage.tsx.

Fix all issues in the app's authentication and onboarding flow: ensure Internet Identity login correctly triggers the AddContactDetailsPage for new users and the Dashboard for returning users, and that logout properly resets the per-principal localStorage state.

Fix all issues with date utilities in frontend/src/utils/dateUtils.ts, including correct conversion between IC nanosecond timestamps and JavaScript Dates, accurate machine cleaning status computation (ok, due-soon, due-today, overdue), and correct next-due-date calculation logic.
